languages.text: {n}Вас бросает в жар от волнения, а пот заливает глаза. Когда лазерный резак добирается до места, где металл переходит в плоть, ваша рука соскальзывает, грубо рассекая доступную часть конструкта и несколько трубок с масляной жидкостью, которая немедленно заливает все вокруг. Вы собираете уцелевшие образцы, отрываете несколько манипуляторов и складываете все в контейнер. Остается надеяться, что этих исследовательских материалов вам хватит.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Anxiety makes you feel hot, with acrid sweat eating away at your eyes. When the plasma cutter gets to the place where metal fuses with living flesh, your hand slips, crudely severing the accessible part of the construct and a few reservoirs with oily liquid that immediately splashes everywhere. You gather the intact samples, tear away several manipulators and put everything into a container, hoping these research materials will be enough.{/n}

You gather the intact samples, tear away several manipulators and put everything into a container, hoping these research materials will be enough.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vor lauter Angst wird dir heiß, und beißender Schweiß brennt in deinen Augen. Als der Plasmaschneider die Stelle erreicht, an der das Metall mit dem lebenden Fleisch verschmilzt, rutscht dir die Hand ab und trennt grob den zugänglichen Teil des Konstrukts und einige Behälter mit öliger Flüssigkeit ab, die sofort überall hin spritzt. Du sammelst die intakten Proben ein, reißt mehrere Manipulatoren ab und packst alles in einen Behälter, in der Hoffnung, dass diese Forschungsmaterialien ausreichen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Anxiety makes you feel hot, with acrid sweat eating away at your eyes. When the plasma cutter gets to the place where metal fuses with living flesh, your hand slips, crudely severing the accessible part of the construct and a few reservoirs with oily liquid that immediately splashes everywhere. You gather the intact samples, tear away several manipulators and put everything into a container, hoping these research materials will be enough.{/n}

languages.text: {n}L'anxiété vous donne chaud, une sueur âcre vous dévore les yeux. Lorsque le découpeur plasma arrive à l'endroit où le métal fusionne avec la chair vivante, votre main glisse, sectionnant grossièrement la partie accessible de la construction et quelques réservoirs d'un liquide huileux qui éclabousse immédiatement tout le monde. Vous rassemblez les échantillons intacts, arrachez plusieurs manipulateurs et mettez le tout dans un conteneur, en espérant que ces matériaux de recherche suffiront.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Anxiety makes you feel hot, with acrid sweat eating away at your eyes. When the plasma cutter gets to the place where metal fuses with living flesh, your hand slips, crudely severing the accessible part of the construct and a few reservoirs with oily liquid that immediately splashes everywhere. You gather the intact samples, tear away several manipulators and put everything into a container, hoping these research materials will be enough.{/n}

languages.text: {n}焦虑让你感到燥热，刺鼻的汗水侵蚀着你的双眼。当等离子切割器切到金属与活肉融合的地方时，你的手滑了一下，粗暴地切断了构造物的可触及部分，几个蓄水池里的油状液体立刻溅得到处都是。你收集完好的样本，撕开几个操纵器，把所有东西都放进一个容器里，希望这些研究材料够用。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Anxiety makes you feel hot, with acrid sweat eating away at your eyes. When the plasma cutter gets to the place where metal fuses with living flesh, your hand slips, crudely severing the accessible part of the construct and a few reservoirs with oily liquid that immediately splashes everywhere. You gather the intact samples, tear away several manipulators and put everything into a container, hoping these research materials will be enough.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La ansiedad te acalora, con un sudor acre que te corroe los ojos. Cuando el cortador de plasma llega al lugar donde el metal se funde con la carne viva, tu mano resbala, seccionando crudamente la parte accesible del constructo y unos cuantos depósitos con líquido aceitoso que salpica inmediatamente por todas partes. Recoges las muestras intactas, arrancas varios manipuladores y lo pones todo en un contenedor, esperando que estos materiales de investigación sean suficientes.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Anxiety makes you feel hot, with acrid sweat eating away at your eyes. When the plasma cutter gets to the place where metal fuses with living flesh, your hand slips, crudely severing the accessible part of the construct and a few reservoirs with oily liquid that immediately splashes everywhere. You gather the intact samples, tear away several manipulators and put everything into a container, hoping these research materials will be enough.{/n}

languages.text: {n}不安はあなたを熱くさせ、刺激的な汗が目を蝕む。プラズマ・カッターが金属と生身の肉体が融合する場所に差し掛かったとき、あなたの手が滑って、構築物のアクセス可能な部分と、すぐにあちこちに飛び散る油性の液体でいくつかの貯水池を無残に切断してしまった。あなたは無傷のサンプルを集め、いくつかのマニピュレーターを切り離し、すべてを容器に入れた。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Anxiety makes you feel hot, with acrid sweat eating away at your eyes. When the plasma cutter gets to the place where metal fuses with living flesh, your hand slips, crudely severing the accessible part of the construct and a few reservoirs with oily liquid that immediately splashes everywhere. You gather the intact samples, tear away several manipulators and put everything into a container, hoping these research materials will be enough.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Endişe sizi sıcak hissettiriyor, buruk ter gözlerinizi yiyip bitiriyor. Plazma kesici metalin canlı etle birleştiği yere geldiğinde, eliniz kayıyor ve yapının erişilebilir kısmını ve hemen her yere sıçrayan yağlı sıvı ile birkaç hazneyi kabaca kesiyor. Sağlam örnekleri topluyor, birkaç manipülatörü koparıyor ve bu araştırma malzemelerinin yeterli olacağını umarak her şeyi bir kaba koyuyorsunuz.{/n}
